title: Lumina Search Service API Schema
description: JSON schema for all Lumina Search Service browser tool APIs: Search, Open, and Find.

x-api-endpoints.description: All API endpoints are relative to the base endpoint configured via LuminaApiAfdEndpoint (production: https://api.copilotlumina.com, SDF: https://api.sdf.copilotlumina.com). Override via LuminaExperimentServiceEndpoint config. All endpoints use HTTP POST with JSON body.

open.description: Open a page by ref ID or URL. Batch-capable.

find.description: Find text pattern in an opened page. Requires ToolState.

ToolState.description: Session state for multi-turn browser tool interactions. Propagated across Search → Open → Find operations.

sessionId.description: Unique session identifier for the Lumina tool state.

pages.description: Map of pageId to page state information.

pageStack.description: Stack of page references for navigation history.

urlLookup.description: Map of URL to page state for reverse lookups.

PageStateInfo.description: State information for a page in the tool state.

urls.description: List of URLs on the page.

imageUrls.description: List of image URLs on the page.

LuminaContext.description: Context metadata sent with every Lumina request for tracing, routing, and scenario selection.

traceId.description: Telemetry scope trace identifier for distributed tracing.

isDebugMode.description: Whether debug telemetry streaming is enabled.

experimentConfig.description: Lumina experiment configuration (opaque to the caller).

PageContextInfo.description: Reference to a page in the tool state. Used to identify pages across Search/Open/Find operations.

id.description: Numeric index within the result set.

turn.description: Conversation turn number when this page was created.

action.description: Action that produced this page context.

rid.description: Request identifier for the operation that produced this page context.

loc.description: Line offset location in the page content.

lineNum.description: Number of lines of content from loc.

lines.description: Number of lines of content from loc (alias for lineNum).

SearchRequestAdditionalConfig.description: Additional grounding API configuration for search requests, derived from WebGroundingRequestInvocationConfig.

maxGroundingResults.description: Maximum number of grounding results to return.

maxGroundingResultSize.description: Maximum size (bytes) of each grounding result.

maxNonWebAnswers.description: Maximum number of non-web answer types (news, weather, finance).

maxSemanticDocumentLength.description: Maximum length of semantic document content.

mobile.description: Whether request originates from mobile client.

useCompliantIndex.description: Whether to use the compliant search index.

enablePCM.description: Whether to enable Publisher Content Marketplace.

RichCardsRequest.description: Rich cards configuration for search results.

renderForIsoComp.description: Whether to render for ISO compatibility.

ErrorDetail.description: Error detail from Lumina response pages.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code of the error.

LinkInfo.description: Link information extracted from a page.

linkId.description: Numeric index of the link within the page.

name.description: Display name or anchor text of the link.

DocumentInfo.description: Document information within a page response.

imageLinks.description: Image links found in the page.

StructuredDocument.description: Structured document content with template and extracted links, returned in Open responses.

template.description: Page content as a template string with link placeholders (e.g., [[[link_0]]]).

links.description: Hyperlinks extracted from the page, referenced by linkId in the template.

imageLinks.description: Image links extracted from the page.

CursorContext.description: Cursor context for pagination across result sets.

refCursor.description: Reference cursor position for the current result set.

CardResult.description: Rich card result metadata associated with a search query.

query.description: The search query associated with this card result.

SearchResponseMetadata.description: Metadata about a search query execution within the response.

q.description: The search query that was executed.

eventId.description: Unique event identifier for this search execution.

executionTimeInMs.description: Time taken to execute the search query in milliseconds.

IndexedResult.description: Indexed result entry from Find operations, indicating indexing status per page.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed, empty string on success.

SearchRequestItem.description: A single search query item sent to Lumina.

topN.description: Maximum number of results to return.

recency.description: Number of days for recency filtering. 0 = no filter.

OpenRequestItem.description: A single page open request item.

pageContext.description: Page context from a previous search result. When action is 'view', use with 'id' to open an external link from the page.

id.description: External link position index in the link list. Used when pageContext action is 'view' to specify which link to open.

refId.description: Direct URL to open (alternative to pageContext).

enimgoutlinks.description: Whether to include image out-links in the response.

lineNo.description: Start line number for page content.

numLines.description: Number of lines of page content to return.

id.description: External link position index in the link list. Used when action is 'view' to specify which link to target.

pattern.description: Text pattern to search for in the page.

SearchResultItem.description: A single search result from Lumina.

url.description: URL of the search result page.

title.description: Title of the search result page.

content.description: Semantic document content (grounding text). Alias for semanticDocument used in MCP layer.

semanticDocument.description: Full semantic document content (grounding text) from search result.

pageContext.description: Page context for referencing this result in subsequent Open/Find operations.

dateLastCrawled.description: Date when the content was last crawled by the search engine.

language.description: Two-letter ISO language code of the content (e.g., 'en').

q.description: The search query that produced this result.

query.description: The search query that produced this result (alias for q).

source.description: Data source used for this result (e.g., 'web_with_bing').

snippets.description: Short text snippets from the search result.

remainingLines.description: Number of remaining content lines available for context.

PageItem.description: A page item from Open responses.

structuredDocument.description: Structured document with template content and extracted links.

pageContext.description: Page context for referencing this page.

cursorContext.description: Cursor context for pagination within this page.

success.description: Whether the page was successfully retrieved.

dependencyTraceId.description: Trace ID for the dependency call.

totalLines.description: Total number of lines in the full page.

FindResultItem.description: A find result from the Find API.

pageId.description: Page ID where the pattern was found.

template.description: Matched content as a template string with link placeholders (e.g., [[[link_0]]]).

lineIdx.description: Line index where the match was found in the page.

links.description: Hyperlinks extracted from the matched content.

imageLinks.description: Image links extracted from the matched content.

pageContext.description: Page context for the matched result.

cursorContext.description: Cursor context for pagination within results.

SearchRequest.description: Request payload for the Lumina Search API (browser.search / search_query tool).

requests.description: Array of search query items (supports batch search).

toolState.description: Session state from previous operations (null on first search).

context.description: Request context metadata for tracing and routing.

SearchResponse.description: Response payload from the Lumina Search API.

toolState.description: Updated session state to pass to subsequent operations.

pageId.description: Page identifier for the search results page.

pageContext.description: Page context for the search results page, usable in subsequent operations.

cursorContext.description: Cursor context for pagination of search results.

cardResults.description: Rich card results associated with the search queries.

searchResponseMetadataList.description: Metadata about each search query execution (timing, event IDs).

errors.description: Error messages if any queries failed.

OpenRequest.description: Request payload for the Lumina Open API (browser.open tool). Opens pages from search results or direct URLs.

requests.description: Array of page open request items (supports batch open).

toolState.description: Session state from previous search operation (required).

OpenResponse.description: Response payload from the Lumina Open API (PageResponse type).

pages.description: Array of opened page items with content.

FindRequest.description: Request payload for the Lumina Find API (browser.find tool). Searches for text within opened pages.

requests.description: Array of find request items (supports batch find).

toolState.description: Session state (required — page must have been opened first).

FindResponse.description: Response payload from the Lumina Find API.

results.description: Array of find results with matched content.

indexedResults.description: Indexing status for each page that was searched.
